name: M3 Hospitality Accounting & Analytics API
what_it_does: M3 hotel accounting and analytics cloud platform REST API for hospitality industry financial management, property-level accounting, and performance benchmarking. Enables AI agents to manage property-level general ledger and financial close for hotel accounting automation, handle accounts payable and vendor payment processing for hospitality AP automation, access daily revenue and statistical data integration from PMS (Property Management Systems) for hotel financial automation, retrieve labor management and scheduling data for hotel workforce cost automation, manage multi-property financial consolidation and portfolio reporting for hotel group financial intelligence, handle budget and forecasting workflow for hotel financial planning automation, access USALI (Uniform System of Accounts for Lodging Industry) financial statement production for industry-standard reporting automation, retrieve accounts receivable and direct bill management for hotel AR automation, manage owner and management company reporting for hotel asset management, and integrate M3 with Opera (Oracle), Maestro, and Agilysys PMS, and STR benchmarking data.
use_cases: Closing hotel financials from accounting automation agents
Consolidating portfolio P&L from hotel group agents
Integrating PMS revenue from hospitality data agents
Managing hotel AP from vendor payment agents
not_for: Restaurant and food service accounting (use Toast or Restaurant365)
Large enterprise corporate accounting beyond hospitality
Revenue management and pricing optimization (use IDeaS or Duetto)
best_when: A hotel management company, hotel REIT, or multi-property hospitality group wanting AI agents to automate property-level accounting, multi-property financial consolidation, PMS-to-accounting data integration, and USALI financial reporting within M3 as the hospitality ERP.
avoid_when: PMS DAILY REVENUE MAPPING ACCURACY: Automated PMS-to-M3 revenue mapping from hotel property management systems (Opera, Maestro, Agilysys) must correctly map PMS revenue categories to USALI chart of accounts; automated revenue integration with incorrect account mapping creates financial misclassification in USALI income statements and owner reporting. USALI STATEMENT PRESENTATION FOR OWNER REPORTING: Automated USALI financial statement generation must apply correct departmental segmentation (rooms, food and beverage, other operated departments) and undistributed expense allocation; automated owner reporting with non-USALI-compliant presentation creates owner dispute and management agreement violation. MULTI-PROPERTY INTERCOMPANY MANAGEMENT FEE ACCURACY: Automated management fee calculation in multi-property hotel portfolios must apply correct fee basis (gross revenues, adjusted gross operating profit) per individual management agreement; automated management fee with incorrect base calculation creates management company contract dispute.

auth.notes: M3 uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Gainesville, Georgia HQ (M3 Accounting Services). Founded 2002. Private (majority owned by Thoma Bravo, PE firm). 9,000+ hotel properties on platform. Hotel management company, REIT, and ownership group focus. USALI accounting standard. PMS integrations with Opera, Maestro, Agilysys, Springer-Miller. STR benchmarking data integration. Competes with Aptech, Sage Intacct for Hospitality, and Oracle MICROS for hotel accounting.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-property annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per hotel property; core accounting, analytics, and labor modules; volume pricing for large portfolios
pricing.notes: Gainesville GA. Thoma Bravo PE-backed. Founded 2002. 9,000+ hotel properties. Hospitality accounting and analytics. Per-property annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; financial period queries and PMS data ingestion throttled; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — DAILY REVENUE AND FINANCIAL EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: M3 does not support native webhooks; automated PMS revenue integration, daily trial balance, and period-close events require scheduled polling aligned with hospitality daily financial close cycle (typically night audit + morning close)

PMS REVENUE CATEGORY TO USALI CHART OF ACCOUNTS MAPPING COMPLEXITY: Automated M3 integration from hotel PMS must map PMS-specific revenue codes to M3 USALI chart of accounts; PMS-to-USALI mapping varies by hotel brand, PMS system, and management company convention; mapping errors create USALI departmental misclassification affecting owner reports

PERIOD CLOSE LOCKOUT FOR FINANCIAL INTEGRITY: M3 applies accounting period close that locks prior-period transactions; automated PMS revenue posting or AP entry must check period-close status; late-arriving transactions for closed periods require manual journal entry or period reopen with controller approval

Multi-property portfolio API credential scoping — M3 API credentials are scoped to management company or ownership group; automated portfolio-level reporting across 50+ properties requires aggregate API calls per property or portfolio-level API endpoint; design for per-property data retrieval with portfolio rollup in automation layer

Labor management data from third-party scheduling integration — M3 labor data depends on integration with hotel scheduling systems (HotSchedules, Deputy, Schedule360); automated labor cost reporting requires validating labor data feed freshness from scheduling integration; stale labor data creates inaccurate departmental labor cost in P&L

Thoma Bravo PE ownership strategic direction — M3 is PE-backed by Thoma Bravo; PE-backed SaaS companies may be acquisition targets or undergo strategic pivots; monitor M3 ownership and product direction for continuity risk in long-term automation investment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hospitality accounting. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Hotel financial and property data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel accounting. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US only. Hotel financial and property data.
